ci.prTitle: fix(claude-tooling): repair mujaz hooks, merge statusline with global

metadata.gitDiff:
diff --git a/.claude/hooks/mujaz-statusline.sh b/.claude/hooks/mujaz-statusline.sh
index 14d2a2f..5840bce 100755
--- a/.claude/hooks/mujaz-statusline.sh
+++ b/.claude/hooks/mujaz-statusline.sh
@@ -1,19 +1,31 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
-# Statusline badge: [MUJAZ] plus a running "tokens saved" counter from
-# .claude/.mujaz-stats.json (see mujaz-stats.js). Reads stdin (Claude Code
-# passes session/model JSON) but doesn't need it — badge is static content.
-cat >/dev/null
+# Statusline: user's global statusline (~/.claude/statusline-command.sh),
+# then a [MUJAZ] badge with a running "tokens saved" counter from
+# .claude/.mujaz-stats.json (see mujaz-stats.js).
+input="$(cat)"
 
 DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 STATS_FILE="$DIR/../.mujaz-stats.json"
 OFF_FLAG="$DIR/../.mujaz-off"
+GLOBAL_STATUSLINE="$HOME/.claude/statusline-command.sh"
+
+base=""
+if [ -f "$GLOBAL_STATUSLINE" ]; then
+  base="$(printf '%s' "$input" | bash "$GLOBAL_STATUSLINE")"
+fi
 
 if [ -f "$OFF_FLAG" ]; then
-  echo "[mujaz: off]"
+  badge="[mujaz: off]"
 elif [ -f "$STATS_FILE" ]; then
   # Pure-bash extraction — avoids spawning node on every statusline repaint.
   saved=$(grep -o '"totalSavedTokens"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*' "$STATS_FILE" | grep -o '[0-9]*$')
-  echo "[MUJAZ] ~${saved:-0} tokens saved (est.)"
+  badge="[MUJAZ] ~${saved:-0} tokens saved (est.)"
+else
+  badge="[MUJAZ]"
+fi
+
+if [ -n "$base" ]; then
+  printf '%s | %s\n' "$base" "$badge"
 else
-  echo "[MUJAZ]"
+  printf '%s\n' "$badge"
 fi
diff --git a/.claude/settings.json b/.claude/settings.json
index a79cd89..c6ef561 100644
--- a/.claude/settings.json
+++ b/.claude/settings.json
@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 {
   "hooks": {
     "SessionStart": [
-      { "type": "command", "command": "node .claude/hooks/mujaz-mode.js" }
+      { "hooks": [{ "type": "command", "command": "node .claude/hooks/mujaz-mode.js" }] }
     ],
     "UserPromptSubmit": [
-      { "type": "command", "command": "node .claude/hooks/mujaz-mode.js" }
+      { "hooks": [{ "type": "command", "command": "node .claude/hooks/mujaz-mode.js" }] }
     ],
     "Stop": [
-      { "type": "command", "command": "node .claude/hooks/mujaz-stats.js" }
+      { "hooks": [{ "type": "command", "command": "node .claude/hooks/mujaz-stats.js" }] }
     ]
   },
   "statusLine": {
